title: Situated Testimony: anchor a witness or artist account to a 3D model, a map, and a timeline
description: The third tool of the Parallax suite, a counter-forensic toolkit for art history and the archive. Records an account as time-coded statements situated in space (a point on a 3D model and on the map) and ordered on a timeline, with a single publish boundary and a lean data-sovereignty layer. Source-available and published for verifiability, not as a product to adopt. Source code is licensed under the PolyForm Noncommercial License 1.0.0; the non-code assets under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0.

creators.name: O'Brien, Jeff
creators.affiliation: Material / Image Research Lab (MIRL), University of California, Santa Barbara
